jd_text: We’re looking for an experienced and proactive 𝗦𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗼𝗿 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗺 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗦𝗽𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝘁 to lead the planning, implementation, and oversight of strategic programs. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on data-driven insights, stakeholder collaboration, and ensuring programs deliver measurable results. Key Responsibilities Strategic Program Oversight: Lead planning and coordination of programs, ensuring goals are clearly defined and milestones are met. Performance Tracking: Design measurement systems to monitor program effectiveness, identify gaps, and suggest improvements. Data-Driven Insights: Analyze program performance data to provide actionable recommendations and support decision-making. Support & Capacity Building: Provide technical guidance, coaching, and training to teams to enhance program delivery. Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with internal teams and external stakeholders to ensure smooth program implementation and alignment with objectives. Operational Excellence: Streamline processes, manage daily activities, and ensure programs are delivered efficiently and on time. What We’re Looking For Bachelor’s degree in Program Management, Business Administration, or a related field 6+ years of experience in program or project management Strong expertise in program evaluation, data analysis, and reporting Proven ability to collaborate with stakeholders and improve operational workflows Excellent organizational, analytical, and communication skills Why This Role Stands Out You will play a key role in shaping program success, driving measurable outcomes, and strengthening your expertise in strategic program management. How to Apply If you are passionate about designing and managing high-impact programs, we’d love to hear from you. ***Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted***
